title: ri
text: ri Specify whether Uniface or the DBMS is responsible for maintaining referential integrity. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = ri : uniface | dbms Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax DB2 connector DB2 USYS$DB2_PARAMS MS SQL connector MSS USYS$MSS_PARAMS Description This option controls whether Uniface will provide referential integrity support, or whether this is left to the database. If not specified, the default is uniface . Scripts need to be generated with the specification of tables and the specification of constraints which define the characteristics of the behavior of relations. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
